subcodes.first_line: O ye friends of 'Abdu'l-Bahá! The Reality of the Kingdom, which in this sacred age hath manifested itself in the realm of contingent being [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران عبدالبهاء حقیقت ملکوت که در این عصر مقدس در قطب امکان جلوه نموده
subcodes.subjects: @education of children; moral education, @spiritual transformation, @Manifestation of God as educator, @call to action, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life
